brand.name: Summit Furniture
brand.announcementText: Cylindo 3D Product Visualization Demo — Summit Furniture

products.name: X Collection Lounge Chair
products.description: Lounge chair with arms in plantation-grown teak and marine-grade stainless-steel fittings. Oversized proportions with extra-wide arms and generous seating space. Designed by Alwy Visschedyk, the teak transforms from warm honey brown to silvery grey patina over time.

highlights.title: Plantation-Grown Teak
highlights.description: Sustainably sourced teak that develops a beautiful silvery grey patina over time.

highlights.title: Marine-Grade Fittings
highlights.description: Stainless-steel hardware built to withstand the elements in any climate.

highlights.title: Oversized Proportions
highlights.description: Extra-wide arms and generous seating space for ultimate outdoor comfort.

highlights.title: Designer Craftsmanship
highlights.description: Designed by Alwy Visschedyk with meticulous attention to detail.

highlights.title: Interactive 3D
highlights.description: Explore every angle and upholstery option with Cylindo's 360° viewer.

faqs.q: What type of teak is used?
faqs.a: Summit uses plantation-grown teak, sustainably sourced and known for its natural durability and beauty.

faqs.q: Will the teak change color over time?
faqs.a: Yes — teak naturally transforms from a warm honey brown to a silvery grey patina. This can be maintained or allowed to develop naturally.
Summit offers a wide range of performance fabrics including Summit Endurance, Nina Campbell, and Ultra collections. Contact your sales representative for the full range.

faqs.q: Is this suitable for outdoor use?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The X Collection is designed for outdoor and hospitality environments with marine-grade stainless-steel fittings.

faqs.q: How do I place an order?
faqs.a: Contact Summit Furniture at sales@summitfurniture.com or visit a showroom.

products.name: X Collection Footrest
products.description: Matching footrest for the X Collection in plantation-grown teak and marine-grade stainless-steel fittings. Designed to pair perfectly with the X Collection Lounge Chair for complete outdoor relaxation.

highlights.title: Perfect Pairing
highlights.description: Designed to complement the X Collection Lounge Chair for a complete outdoor set.

highlights.title: Plantation-Grown Teak
highlights.description: Sustainably sourced teak that develops a beautiful silvery grey patina over time.

highlights.title: Marine-Grade Fittings
highlights.description: Stainless-steel hardware built to withstand the elements.

highlights.title: Performance Fabrics
highlights.description: Choose from Summit's curated fabric collections for the perfect look.

highlights.title: Interactive 3D
highlights.description: Explore every angle with Cylindo's 360° viewer.

faqs.q: Does this pair with the X Collection Lounge Chair?
faqs.a: Yes — the footrest is designed as a matching companion to the X Collection Lounge Chair.
Contact Summit Furniture for the full range of fabric options beyond the 3D preview selections.

faqs.q: How do I place an order?
faqs.a: Contact Summit Furniture at sales@summitfurniture.com or visit a showroom.
